programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Assess the risks of trusting an inspection to reveal major underlying issues.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Flip for a home with upstairs living areas that capture the beautiful view.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Face deadlines and surprise costs as a duo turns a shaky barn into a luxe home.

programme.title: Build Your Dream Home In The Country
programme.desc: Grapple with a couple’s no-plans approach to DIY in their movable off-grid home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Dig up fixes to home-inspection misses that buoy a dog-loving couple’s spirits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection

programme.desc: Uncover cracks in MJ’s hot tub dreams as heavy rain dampens timbers and spirits.

programme.desc: Check in with MJ, who has to take the helm when Mike and the crew fall ill.

programme.desc: Descend into endless debates as Mike’s job-site takeover ratchets up tension.
